full_text:
Li Heng (Shuping) 李衡 (叔平)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Heng (李衡), styledShuping (叔平), was born in Xiangyang. Helped end Lu Yi’s career and served as Zhuge Ke’s aide. Got in trouble with Sun Xiu. Li Heng was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
